programme.desc: Géopolitique, environnement, sciences sociales, ou culture : des experts se réunissent pour débattre de sujets divers et variés qui font la une de l'actualité.

programme.title: Derrière l'image[Live]
programme.desc: Derrière l'image' se base sur une image forte de l'actualité des dernières semaines, sur tous les sujets, et en propose l'analyse et le décryptage.'

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Le rendez-vous de l'Afrique[Live]
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique avec ce rendez-vous quotidien qui suit l'actualité du continent en compagnie des correspondants locaux et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: #Pas2quartier
programme.desc: Dans ce programme participatif, les présentateurs racontent le quotidien des quartiers populaires en France en s'appuyant sur des images tournées par les habitants.

programme.title: Mode
programme.desc: Ce magazine propose un décryptage de l'univers de la mode : les coulisses, les icônes, les secrets de fabrication, les événements incontournables.

programme.title: Elément Terre[Live]
programme.desc: Le magazine Elément Terre' fait découvrir les projets et les sujets autour de l'environnement et du développent durable, partout sur la planète. '

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Économie[Live]
programme.desc: Quels sont les sujets brûlants de l'actualité économique ? Un magazine éco qui décrypte et décrit avec rigueur et clarté les principales problématiques économiques.

programme.title: Sports[Live]
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Le débat[Live]
programme.desc: Présentateurs et invités débattent et analysent du grand sujet d'actualité du jour. Internautes et téléspectateurs peuvent interagir en direct sur les réseaux sociaux : #DebatF24.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'info : grand journal, économie, sport, décryptages et analyses des événements majeurs du moment. Pour tout savoir, pour mieux comprendre.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E207 - iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: E114 - Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: E412 - Car Trek
programme.desc: Charlotte's birthday road trip to see the Boo Man Group perform gets sidetracked by a Captain Man and Kid Danger emergency.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E241 - Squirrel Jelly
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E208 - Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: E104 - iNevel
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by 'Nevelocity', a really popular website that reviews websites and webcasts. When Carly goes to meet Nevel, she finds out he is an annoying boy who wants to date her.

programme.title: E220 - Yes Man / Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the 'Master of Convincing' (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E4 - Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with Cody as he welcomes his new sister, Kendi! First, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother & helps his family prepare. Then, he excitedly welcomes Kendi home & takes on the role of responsible big brother, helping her get to sleep. The sibling bonding continues as they play peek-a-boo, bounce balloons & make funny faces in the mirror. Watch as Cody learns to share & be the best big brother ever!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E4 - Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with Cody as he welcomes his new sister, Kendi! First, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother & helps his family prepare. Then, he excitedly welcomes Kendi home & takes on the role of responsible big brother, helping her get to sleep. The sibling bonding continues as they play peek-a-boo, bounce balloons & make funny faces in the mirror. Watch as Cody learns to share & be the best big brother ever!

The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E188
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E133
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Vasudha E483
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E258
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a balloon shop. Shiro rushes to the scene but the balloon has flown away. He jumps onto Deca's drone and discovers a whole new world.

programme.desc: Porky pretends Daffy is his emotional support duck. Foghorn plays a painful game of tennis. Charlie Dog lets everyone know he's the greatest dog ever.

programme.desc: Nicole needs to make sure Gumball makes something of himself so that when he’s older, he flies the nest instead of being a slob at home forever.

programme.desc: The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except, it's actually a turtle, and it hates them!

programme.title: E1308 - The Mug/Hafo Safo/Pig In A Poke/P.P./A Little Help Please
programme.desc: Robin dreams of receiving a #1 Dad mug, so Raven magically turns them into a sitcom family.

programme.title: E9 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: With just 4 bakers left in the competition, the pressure has ramped up once again with patisserie week, including bombe, and a difficult bake reportedly dedicated to the patron saint of baking. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E111 - Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: E817 - Grandpa Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E103 - The Driving Force
programme.desc: When Starla the friendly cowgirl truck loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ set out to get it back. But they'll have to hurry before Crusher gets his greedy tires on it!

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa!

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E106 - Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E817 - Grandpa Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E323 - Pups Save A Plane
programme.desc: It's a double daring mid air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways, the Pups make sure everyone lands safely.

programme.title: E208 - The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: E106 - The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E103 - The Driving Force
programme.desc: When Starla the friendly cowgirl truck loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ set out to get it back. But they'll have to hurry before Crusher gets his greedy tires on it!

programme.title: E113 - The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds A Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: E128 - My Cousin Chloe
programme.desc: Peppa and George's cousin Chloe comes to their house. Peppa tries to show Chloe that she is a big girl, but it is very hard.

programme.title: E730 - Soft Play
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited, and that can only mean one thing; Soft Play!

programme.title: E110 - Shark Marks The Spot
programme.desc: Royce wants to go on a treasure hunt with Max, but Max is distracted with Sharkdog.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E201 - Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: E524 - Pups Save A Mascot
programme.desc: Daring Danny X, dressed as a 'Bird X' mascot for the Adventure Bay, gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own!

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: U.s. Markets Edition

programme.title: The China Connection

programme.title: E5 - Concrete Evidence
programme.desc: Optimism abounds when the Fellowship returns to Smith's Cove and finds evidence of work that could finally uncover the legendary flood tunnels and lead them directly to the Money Pit.

programme.title: E8 - Pirates In The Caribbean
programme.desc: Are modern-day pirates prowling the Bermuda Triangle in search of victims? The team takes on the twisted case of a missing boat called the Saba Bank lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974.

programme.title: E4 - Treasure Island
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.desc: A daring rocket and helicopter experiment results in the team witnessing a phenomenon that might prove an ancient legend about Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: The Many Sides of Triangles
programme.desc: Eric tests the strength of a paper chair. Will it buckle under pressure or will it stand up to the test? Triangles are inherently strong because they form a fixed shape that's been used in architecture throughout the ages, but are they really the strongest shape ever?

programme.title: Artists of the Environment
programme.desc: Philippe travels to spectacular places on earth. He explores the different ways an environmental painter, sculptor, photographer and craftsman blend nature with art.

programme.title: Hottentots Holland Nature Reserve - On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When travelling across a mountain range, the team must cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables between heaven and earth. When they discover the only way forward is to jump into a giant waterfall, the team has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.title: Really Remarkable Robotics
programme.desc: What role do robots play in the future of mankind? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of robotics. Have hands-on fun by creating your own robot, and get to know Hiroshi Ishiguro, a pioneer of humanoid robotics, known as the man who copied himself.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: The Raucous Racket
programme.desc: Addison, Kevin and Tess are trying to make a rap music video for Ayrton Park's Summer Fest Movie Night, but a persistent very LOUD buzzing from above keeps ruining everything! Addison sets out to solve the mystery of what's making all the noise.

programme.title: Toothbrush
programme.desc: Be prepared to be ''brushed'' off your feet with this entertaining episode.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: The Wall of Equality
programme.desc: Aminata suggests to the kids to paint the old wall of the basketball court, but everyone wants to paint it their own way. Ending up alone, Mily wonders how she could make everyone agree with each other, despite all their differences in terms of style and taste.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Atlantic Puffin
programme.desc: Franky thinks the puffins on TV must be robots, and Tiny Owl worries that he might not be the cutest critter in town anymore as Mommy and Daddy fall in love with the puffins on TV. Grandad Badger tells Binah about the time he was a circus clown.

programme.title: Chasing Dreams
programme.desc: All over England, the artistic boys are preparing for the National Championships. Ekraj has been selected for the South West team, and he has to perform at his very best to help win the team a medal.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E14 -Big Catch
programme.desc: When our final three chefs find themselves locked in the Rec Room, they'll need to rack their brains to solve clues and uncover the escape key. Once out, they’ll have limited time to impress Guest Judge Brooke Williamson with a sophisticated shellfish dish. Later, the chefs hit the high seas on their very own boat with Head Judge Curtis Stone and world-famous Chef Lorena Garcia. They must try and capture their own fish for the first ever Top Chef Junior Rod & Reel Festival!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E2 -It's No Picnic
programme.desc: The Bean Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts settle their mud puddle squabble during a 'friendly' picnic.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E3 -The Weakest Link
programme.desc: The campers send the Jelly Beans on a 'wild goose chase' so they won't bungle the camp inspection!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E9 -Treehouse Broken
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E11 -Stranger Than Friction
programme.desc: Andy and Salty Mike discover that they have the same weird hobby, which leads them to hanging out together.

programme.desc: Elmer Gridlock, the old crossing guard is retiring.

programme.title: Monster Trucks

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E5 - The Coast
programme.desc: Massive elephant seals go nose to nose to win the title of “beachmaster,” and giant petrels earn the nickname, “murderous garbagemen.” Meanwhile, a female humpback goes to extremes to protect her calf from amorous males.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.desc: The remote island group of Svalbard - it is NATO territory but a hundred-year-old treaty grants access to dozens of countries - including Russia. And Russia is using it to build up a strategic foothold in the Arctic.

programme.title: No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Allegations of violence against Antony Catalano amid a steady decline of his regional news empire. Google AI summaries an opportunity for big news players but unlucky for little guys. Crikey wipe articles that fail AI rules.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Episode two sees two of the world's toughest games: footy in the Tiwi Islands and Kabaddi. A highlight for host Paul Kennedy is witnessing the monumental return to Bathurst Islands of favourite son Willie Rioli Jnr.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Iran warns of retaliatory strikes if Trump follows through on his threat to attack Iranian power plants. So, what's Iran's next move? Plus former MMA fighter Markwayne Mullin spars with Senators at his confirmation hearing.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Table For Six 2
programme.desc: Belief in our own blessings can bring us good fortune, but what is true fortune? Fortune and misfortune, love and hate, what is their ultimate definitions? One family, three couples, three weddings. After they decided to move on, what further challenges await them? Marriage isn't just about two individuals; it involves a whole family of aunts, uncles, and cousins. Sunny Chan, with his unique sense of humor, once again dives into the complex dynamics of modern society's men and women, families and romance.

E2 - 劇組重聚回看舊照淚目
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。
